description: 30 clear Software/Application office helpdesk scenarios — Set SW (fresh, Software-only)

cases.title: Outlook Desktop Crashes on Startup
cases.description: Microsoft Outlook desktop crashes immediately on launch with error 'Outlook could not start last time'. Safe mode also fails. Web Outlook works fine in browser.

cases.title: Excel Formulas Show #NAME Error After Update
cases.description: All Excel workbook formulas show #NAME? error after Office 365 update. Macros and data connections broken on monthly finance report. Other Office apps work.

cases.title: Teams Camera Shows Black Screen in Meetings
cases.description: Microsoft Teams video calls show black camera feed to other participants. Camera LED is on but preview is blank. Camera works in Windows Camera app.

cases.title: Chrome Blocks Approved Password Manager Extension
cases.description: Google Chrome shows 'Extension blocked by administrator' for approved 1Password browser extension. Cannot autofill credentials for internal tools.

cases.title: SAP GUI Session Times Out Every 5 Minutes
cases.description: SAP GUI desktop client disconnects every 5 minutes with message 'Session timed out'. Re-login works but session drops again during data entry.

cases.title: Adobe Acrobat Cannot Open Signed PDF Files
cases.description: Adobe Acrobat Reader DC fails to open digitally signed PDF contracts with error 'There was an error opening this document'. Browser PDF preview works.

cases.title: Visio License Activation Failed
cases.description: Microsoft Visio shows 'This product cannot be activated' after laptop replacement. Need Visio re-activated to edit network diagrams for audit.

cases.title: OneNote Notebook Stuck on Syncing Spinner
cases.description: Microsoft OneNote desktop shows perpetual 'Syncing...' on shared team notebook. New notes not visible to teammates. OneNote web shows old content only.

cases.title: Power BI Desktop Dataset Refresh Fails
cases.description: Power BI Desktop refresh fails with 'OLE DB or ODBC error: Login failed for user' when connecting to SQL data source. Report was working yesterday.

cases.title: Slack Desktop Notifications Not Appearing
cases.description: Slack desktop app installed but no popup notifications on Windows 11. Do Not Disturb is off. Slack web in browser shows notifications correctly.

cases.title: Zoom Client Stuck in Update Loop
cases.description: Zoom Workplace desktop app stuck downloading update at 0% for 2 hours. Cannot join client meetings. Zoom web join works as workaround.

cases.title: Word Document Corrupted on Save
cases.description: Microsoft Word shows 'Word found unreadable content' when opening proposal document saved from SharePoint. File was edited for 3 hours — need recovery.

cases.title: SharePoint Online Upload Fails for 2GB Video
cases.description: SharePoint document library upload fails at 99% for 2GB training video file. Error: 'Something went wrong'. Smaller PDF uploads work fine.

cases.title: Confluence Page Editor Freezes on Paste
cases.description: Atlassian Confluence web editor freezes when pasting screenshot into project page. Browser tab becomes unresponsive. Happens in Chrome and Edge.

cases.title: Jira Web Shows HTTP 500 on Issue Search
cases.description: Jira Cloud issue search returns HTTP 500 internal server error for all queries. Jira mobile app and direct issue links by key still work.

cases.title: Salesforce Lightning Page Loads Blank
cases.description: Salesforce Lightning Experience home page loads completely blank white screen. Classic view works when switched manually. Started after sandbox refresh.

cases.title: ServiceNow Incident Form Submit Spinner Forever
cases.description: ServiceNow incident form submit button spins indefinitely after filling all required fields. No error message shown. Other ServiceNow modules load fine.

cases.title: MATLAB License Checkout Failed
cases.description: MATLAB R2024a shows 'License checkout failed' for Signal Processing Toolbox. FlexLM server reachable but checkout times out. Need for simulation today.

cases.title: AutoCAD Drawing Crashes on Open
cases.description: AutoCAD 2024 crashes with fatal error when opening 150MB architectural DWG file. Smaller drawings open fine. Crash dump created in temp folder.

cases.title: VS Code Remote SSH Connection Fails
cases.description: Visual Studio Code Remote SSH extension fails with 'Could not establish connection to dev-server-03'. SSH from terminal works with same key.

cases.title: Notepad++ Crashes When Opening Large Log File
cases.description: Notepad++ crashes immediately when opening 800MB application log file for debugging. Smaller log files under 50MB open without issue.

cases.title: Citrix Published App Disconnects Every 10 Minutes
cases.description: Citrix Workspace published SAP application disconnects every 10 minutes with error 'Connection to server lost'. Other published apps work normally.

cases.title: Tableau Desktop Extract Refresh Failed
cases.description: Tableau Desktop hyper extract refresh fails with 'Unable to connect to data source' for Snowflake connection. Workbook was refreshed successfully last week.

cases.title: Figma Desktop App Sync Error
cases.description: Figma desktop app shows 'Unable to sync file changes' on shared design file. Web version of Figma loads file but desktop shows conflict warning.

cases.title: Microsoft Project MPP File Will Not Open
cases.description: Microsoft Project 2021 shows 'Project cannot open the file' for approved project plan MPP file received from PMO. File opens on colleague's machine.

cases.title: Webex Desktop One-Way Audio on Calls
cases.description: Cisco Webex desktop app — callers hear me but I cannot hear them. Webex web client on same laptop has two-way audio working fine.

cases.title: SAP Crystal Reports Export to PDF Timeout
cases.description: SAP Crystal Reports hangs for 30 minutes then times out when exporting monthly sales report to PDF. Preview in Crystal Reports renders correctly.

cases.title: Intune Company Portal App Install Stuck
cases.description: Intune Company Portal shows 'Installing...' for Adobe Creative Cloud app for 6 hours with no progress. Other apps from portal installed successfully.

cases.title: Google Earth Pro Map Tiles Not Loading
cases.description: Google Earth Pro desktop shows gray map tiles and 'Unable to connect to server' for satellite imagery. Internet connection confirmed working.

cases.title: Box Drive Sync Conflict on Shared Folder
cases.description: Box Drive desktop client reports sync conflict on shared legal folder — duplicate files with (Conflicted Copy) suffix appearing. Box web shows correct version.
